fieldUpdates.description: Stamps the source OpportunityLineItem Id onto the QuoteLineItem on auto-create via the undocumented OpportunityLineItem.Id cross-reference (resolvable only here, not in a Flow). Read by COPY_QuoteLineItemTriggerHandler.
fieldUpdates.name: Set Opportunity Line Item ID

rules.description: Stamps the source OpportunityLineItem Id on UI-auto-created quote line items so COPY_QuoteLineItemTriggerHandler can copy custom OLI fields down. Fires once on create.
